caption: A presentation slide with a deep blue, radial burst background is displayed. Large white text on the left side reads "Kubernetes and Logging: Do It Right," with a smaller line underneath stating "Eduardo Silva, Arm Treasure Data." In the upper right corner, a circular logo for "KubeCon CloudNativeCon North America 2018" features the word "Virtual" written in a script font across the center. As the sequence progresses, a translucent rectangular overlay begins to appear over the right side of the screen. This overlay contains a "fluentbit" logo and repeats the phrase "do it right!" in a smaller font. Additional text appears on the right, including "November 19, 2020," the name "Eduardo Silva," an email address, and a social media handle "@edsiper" next to a small icon. The original background text and logo remain visible behind this shifting overlay.
